details.test: Task 1: Book beginner weekday evening class (next Wednesday, under 25, near 94105)
Task 2: Purchase cheapest monthly membership (>=8 classes, month-to-month)
Task 3: Register for next-month Country Night workshop (>=2h, <50)
Task 4: Book two class seats under 20 in combined booking (multi-class cart flow)
Task 5: Book class with highly rated instructor (prefer weekend morning)
Task 6: Enroll teen in beginner Saturday class (10-14, <=18, near 75201)
Task 7: Buy 5-Class Pass with homepage promo code and guest checkout
Task 8: Find dress code FAQ and submit contact form question
Task 9: Choose free-parking studio near 75201 and book beginner class before 5 PM
